meta_title: For Students: project management to Solve can't scale projects (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome can't scale projects. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Project Management to Solve Scaling Issues
content.seo_description: Learn how to master project management to overcome scaling hurdles. A beginner-level case study using Antigravity and Claude Code to build your first app.
content.answer_block: Scaling issues often stem from technical debt and lack of modular structure. By implementing a robust project management framework using AI-driven tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you can decompose monolithic tasks into manageable, testable components, ensuring your codebase remains clean, extensible, and ready for production-grade growth.
content.intro:
You sit down to code, and suddenly your project is a tangled web of spaghetti code. The initial excitement of your 'Hello World' app has vanished, replaced by the crushing realization that adding one single feature breaks three others. You aren't failing; you are simply hitting the 'Scaling Wall' that every developer encounters on their first major build.

But here is the secret: scale isn't a problem of code volume; it's a problem of architecture and project management. By leveraging modern AI agents to enforce structure from day one, you can transform your chaotic workflow into a professional-grade development pipeline. It is time to stop hacking and start building with intent.

steps.title: Define the Architecture Strategy
steps.description: Before writing code, define your project boundaries. This prevents feature creep and keeps your file structure clean.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-level project roadmap and file directory structure for a scalable SaaS application. Focus on modularity and separation of concerns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Generate a project structure schema based on the Antigravity roadmap provided.'

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate Generation
steps.description: Use AI to scaffold your project, ensuring standard conventions are followed from the first line of code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a baseline codebase for a web application with user authentication and database integration using clean architecture patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize the project scaffold using the generated schema and setup environment variables.'

steps.title: Implement Modular Task Tracking
steps.description: Break your project into small, atomic tasks to ensure you can scale without losing track of dependencies.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Break down the core feature set into 5 distinct, testable modules. Provide a ticket-based workflow for each.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Create a list of tasks in a project.md file based on the modular breakdown.'

steps.title: Enforce Code Quality with AI Agents
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform peer reviews on your own code, catching scaling issues before they compound.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a senior engineer. Review the current code for potential scaling bottlenecks and suggest refactoring patterns.

steps.title: Automate Testing Suites
steps.description: Scaling requires confidence. Every feature must be backed by an automated test to prevent regressions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate unit tests for the core authentication module to ensure future scalability and stability.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate and run test suite for the current module to ensure 90% coverage.'

pro_tips: Always treat your README.md as the 'source of truth' for the project's architectural decisions.
Use AI to generate documentation as you code, not after; it forces you to clarify your logic.
Implement a 'Branch-per-Task' workflow early to keep your main codebase pristine.
Never merge code without an automated test verification, even for minor UI changes.
Keep your dependencies minimal; every external library is a potential point of failure at scale.
content.next_steps: Once you have completed this project, apply these same management principles to a secondary feature. Begin tracking your development time and compare it to your pre-AI workflow to visualize your efficiency gains.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to build software that lasts. Don't let your next project fall victim to poor management. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
